title: rubus mesocladus
intro: Rubus mesocladus, also known as the Himalayan raspberry or Himalayan black raspberry, is a species of flowering plant in the rose family (Rosaceae). The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Rubus mesocladus include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting digestive health. The plant can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or extract, and is often used in Ayurvedic and traditional Chinese medicine.
